stage_description: Trees are in bloom; flower panicles are open and pollination is occurring. This is a short, sensitive window for the whole season's crop.
recommended_monitoring_focus: Watch for unseasonal rain or high humidity (anthracnose / powdery mildew risk on flowers) and avoid waterlogging around the root zone.

stage_description: Trees are in bloom; flower panicles are open and pollination is occurring. This is a short, sensitive window for the whole season's crop.
recommended_monitoring_focus: Watch for unseasonal rain or high humidity (anthracnose / powdery mildew risk on flowers) and avoid waterlogging around the root zone.

stage_description: Post-harvest recovery and vegetative growth (new shoots/leaves); the tree is rebuilding reserves for the next flowering cycle.
recommended_monitoring_focus: Monitor vegetative flush health and watch for monsoon-season fungal/bacterial disease pressure.
